name: Jacob — Clio webhook → GHL + Sheets log

meta.description: Import into n8n on pilot.ignitionsystems.io. 1) Create Clio webhooks for agreement sent/signed and payment. 2) Map matter → GHL contact ID (custom field or lookup table). 3) Set env/credentials: GHL_API_KEY, GHL_LOCATION_ID, GHL_CUSTOM_FIELD_AGREEMENT, GHL_CUSTOM_FIELD_PAYMENT, GHL_CUSTOM_FIELD_CASE_VALUE, IGNITION_CLIO_LOG_URL (POST https://your-app.vercel.app/api/jacob/clio/log), JACOB_CLIO_INBOUND_SECRET. 4) Create intelligence workbook tab 'Clio Sync' with header row: Received (UTC) | Event | GHL Contact ID | Clio Matter ID | Agreement Status | Payment Status | Case Value | Notes | Raw JSON

nodes.name: GHL update contact (fill custom fields)
nodes.notes: Replace jsonBody with real customField IDs for Agreement Status, Payment Status, Case Value. Add pipeline stage move via separate GHL API call if required.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  receivedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  event: $json.event,
  ghlContactId: $json.ghlContactId,
  clioMatterId: $json.clioMatterId,
  agreementStatus: $json.agreementStatus,
  paymentStatus: $json.paymentStatus,
  caseValue: $json.caseValue,
  matterNotes: $json.matterNotes,
  raw: $json.raw
}) }}
